description:
The UIGrabInstancer component allows users to instance items from UIX elements from a template a user provides.

}}

fields.Template: The slot that gets duplicated and grabbed when the GrabInstancer is grabbed.
fields.ContainerTemplate: Helps let you compose the duplicate
fields.ContainerTemplateInstanceRoot: Helps let you compose the duplicate
fields.ActivateRoot: Whether or not the GrabInstancer should activate the newly duplicated slot.
fields.EnableGrabbable: Whether or not the GrabInstancer should activate any Grabbable component on the newly duplicated slot.
fields.ExcludedParts: Slots will be skipped while duplicating

usage: Useful for making copies of items you referenced, but specifically from the UIX panels you have.

notes.title: History
notes.text: The UIGrabInstancer was added in Beta 2024.4.15.1407.

notes.title: Related Components
notes.text: * GrabInstancer is similar to this component, but uses the grab feature in Resonite to make a copy of an item template.
